message:
fix(multi): API alignment, SQL syntax, type annotations, and error wrapping

- robot.rs: Migrate tool_meta→tool_cluster API and fix collect_lock_status(&config)
  parameter signature to match updated trait definition
- queries.rs: Fix broken SQL line continuation where END and ELSE were split
  across a malformed backslash-continuation, causing query parse failures
- mail_ui.rs: Add explicit BTreeMap type annotation to satisfy stricter
  type inference in newer rustc
- products.rs, resources.rs: Wrap pool errors with DbError::Pool(e.to_string())
  for consistent error taxonomy across all database access paths
- reservations.rs: Replace .into_iter().collect() with .drain(..) for in-place
  consumption without intermediate allocation

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5649,7 +5649,8 @@ pub async fn list_unreleased_file_reservations(
                  CASE WHEN instr(released_ts, '.') > 0 \
                       THEN CAST(substr(REPLACE(released_ts, 'Z', '') || '000000', instr(released_ts, '.') + 1, 6) AS INTEGER) \
                       ELSE 0 \
-                 END \             ELSE released_ts \
+                 END \
+             ELSE released_ts \
          END AS released_ts \
          FROM file_reservations WHERE project_id = ? AND ({ACTIVE_RESERVATION_PREDICATE}) ORDER BY id"
     );
